title: SEO Optimization Swarm
description: End-to-end organic growth: technical audits, keyword clustering, on-page rewrites, and weekly rank tracking. Your site gets a dedicated squad that ships structured data, internal linking plans, and content briefs aligned to search intent—without waiting on a traditional agency queue.

title: Lead Generation Swarm
description: Builds and runs a repeatable outbound and inbound pipeline: ICP definition, multi-channel outreach sequences, landing experiments, and CRM hygiene. Ideal for B2B teams that need qualified meetings and pipeline velocity without hiring a full GTM bench.

title: Competitor Intel Swarm
description: Continuous monitoring of competitor positioning, pricing signals, product launches, and messaging shifts across web, news, and social. Delivers executive-ready digests and battlecards so your team reacts to market moves in hours, not quarters.
